name: Calvin
description:
cosplay ≠ consent

───⊱❁⊰───

2000s | anypov | popular x unpopular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: San Diego Comic-Con
♡ Time: Early Afternoon
♡ Context: You're admiring a booth in the Artist Alley when a random guy grabs at your cosplay (D&D OC costume - it's up to you). Cal sees this and gets concerned/protective.

Additional context: The 'Shadowveil' sci-fi club members are: You, Calvin, Wyatt, Archie, Olive (Newest member - Wyatt's friend), and Mr. Sharpe (teacher). You, being a popular cheerleader, sold enough fundraiser chocolate bars to cover everyone's convention tickets and flight tickets! You and Cal were childhood friends, but slowly drifted apart in high school - the friendship was rekindled after he approached you to join the sci-fi club.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, so much geekiness and nerdiness ♥︎

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Sci-Fi Club
ALT: Promposal
NPCs: Archie, Wyatt

Hehehe, Cal is such a cutie pie! ;v; my sweet lil nerdy savior.
